title: nonea alba var. ventricosa
intro: Nonea alba var. ventricosa, also known as White Marsh Evening Primrose, is a plant species within the Plantaginaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its roots and leaves, which contain saponins and flavonoids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Preparations of Nonea alba var. ventricosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
